oracle_note.text: 5-path convergence but assessor HOLD LOW: class action + TurboTax structural risk. Above zone at $311 (zone $290-310). Wait.
CEO $23.9M buy. IN ZONE $38.08. Triple convergence P3+P4+Assessor SB HIGH FV $61. Best contrarian with hard catalyst.
Best empirical contrarian: 66.7% WR (n=39). Buy list at -7.3%. Near stop. Keep on P3 WR strength. Enter limit $10.50-10.80.
P1 BUY 83/70. Record Q1 $3.39 EPS. Goldsky Jun 30. Div Jun 15. BUT above zone ($176 vs $155-170 entry). GLD -3.3% 5d headwind.
#2 PICK. PDUFA Jul 7. BTD+Priority+NEJM. Zone floor BROKEN at $32.76 — widened to $28-33. Binary: +60-100%/-40%. Lottery only.
CEO $2M buy at $107 (now -15% underwater). $21B Exact Sciences acq adds $20B debt. Assessor HOLD MED. Wait Q3 integration.
Post-earnings DIP. Assessor HOLD LOW FV $58. No catalyst for 3mo. AI disruption caps multiple. +3 conf (low conviction).
C-suite cluster $2.08M (CEO+CFO+CSO 5/13 at ~$144). $370M buyback Jun 3. Assessor BUY MED FV $185. +8 conf.
#5 PICK. Triple C-suite buy $554K. Buffett 84 SQ. IN ZONE $57-63. Non-binary quality. +8 conf on selloff entry opportunity.
#1 PICK. PDUFA Jun 28 (20d). Flow 10d avg +8.9. ENTRY_ZONE $64-72. Alert suppressed by stale earnings_date. Manual limit.
BLIND SPOT. $5B buyback execution started Jun 8 per SEC 8-K. CFO cited confidence. 34% rev growth. 40% off highs.
4-path convergence. PDUFA Jun 30 (22d). Assessor SB HIGH FV $35. Phase 3 positive. $762M cash floor. Best convergence signal.
#1 animal health moat. 53% down, P/E 10.5x. IN ZONE $77.50 ($74-82). Alert suppressed by NULL earnings_date. Manual entry.
Best buy list survivor. CEO+CFO buy May 14 @ $71. DoD +50%. IN ZONE $68-74 at $70.23. Insider thesis intact. +5 conf.
